## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX's AI-assisted content production capabilities for Relay Financial to accelerate brand awareness and organic traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an AI-powered agency model with a platform that will become more accessible to clients](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Their approach combines expert strategy with AI-augmented content creation, publishing daily at minimum](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [GrowthX's 8-week strategy sprint ($20k) sets the foundation, followed by ongoing growth execution ($12k+/month)](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Success metrics focus on content volume, organic traffic growth, and AI visibility/citations](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Hybrid Agency-Platform Model

  - [Combines marketing leaders, editors, writers, and SEO experts with an AI-powered platform](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Currently powers their services, with plans to expose more platform features to clients](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Aims to be an extension of the client's team, handling strategy to execution](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)

### Content Strategy and Creation Process

  - [Starts with audience-first mapping and topic clustering](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows for research, drafting, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Editors guide the process and ensure quality output](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Publishes daily, with 42 pieces created for Engine.com in 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

### AI Visibility and Authority Building

  - [Focus on becoming the best answer and resource for target audiences](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Creates comparison content to bias AI answers towards the client](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Emphasizes fresh content updates every \~3 months for evergreen topics](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Demonstrated quick AI visibility gains (e.g., Augmented Code appearing in AI results within 4 days)](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)

### Engagement Model and Team Structure

  - [8-week strategy sprint to set foundation and prove value](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Ongoing growth execution with daily content production](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
  - [Team includes managing director, managing editor, content managers, and specialists](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Collaboration via Slack for regular updates and interactions](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Relay team to discuss internally and consider GrowthX's offering](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [Schedule a deeper dive meeting with GrowthX team for Friday or next week](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [Consider timing, as GrowthX is currently booking for the third week of September](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
  - [Review pricing: $20k for 8-week strategy sprint, $12k+/month for ongoing execution](https://fathom.video/share/LkzGjHYSpMAcCtmpw-Td-vhWuuNJ2vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
